description: Frontend API services, hooks, and TypeScript types for all 10 Batch 2 features. Add API client objects to frontend/src/services/api.ts, React Query hooks to frontend/src/hooks/index.ts, and type interfaces to frontend/src/types/index.ts.
steps: Add to frontend/src/types/index.ts: interfaces for RateUplift, PaymentReminder, OccupancyRecord, OccupancyForecast, StaffCost, CostBudget, JobPosting, JobApplication, Interview, DbsCheck, Competency, StaffCompetency, AbsenceRecord, BradfordScore, FireTest, FireEquipmentCheck, Peep, VisitorRecord, VisitorSafeguarding, RoomTurnover, TurnoverChecklistItem, ReportTemplate, ReportRun
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: invoicingApi object with methods for rate uplifts, payment reminders, revenue dashboard
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: occupancyApi object with methods for recording, history, forecasts, dashboard
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: staffCostsApi object with methods for costs summary, cost per resident, budgets
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: recruitmentApi object with methods for job postings, applications, interviews, DBS checks, pipeline overview
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: competencyApi object with methods for competencies CRUD, staff competencies, matrix view, expiring
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: absenceApi object with methods for recording absences, Bradford scores, patterns, return to work
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: fireLogApi object with methods for fire tests, equipment checks, PEEPs, dashboard
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: visitorsApi object with methods for sign-in/out, history, safeguarding, fire roll, dashboard
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: roomTurnoverApi object with methods for turnovers CRUD, checklist items, dashboard
Add to frontend/src/services/api.ts: reportBuilderApi object with methods for templates CRUD, run reports, list runs, data sources

Add to frontend/src/hooks/index.ts: React Query hooks for all new APIs - useQuery for reads, useMutation for writes with queryClient invalidation and toast notifications, following the existing pattern exactly
Update the import statement at the top of frontend/src/hooks/index.ts to include all new API objects
acceptance_criteria: All new type interfaces are defined in frontend/src/types/index.ts
All new API objects are exported from frontend/src/services/api.ts
All new hooks are exported from frontend/src/hooks/index.ts
Frontend build (tsc && vite build) succeeds without errors
